name: Max SBI Card

rewards.displayCategory: Landmark Stores (Lifestyle, Home Centre, Max, Spar)

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 2,000 welcome bonus Reward Points worth Rs 500

joiningBenefits: 2,000 welcome bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 500) upon payment of joining fee

renewalBenefitsValued.label: 2,000 renewal bonus Reward Points worth Rs 500

renewalBenefits: 2,000 renewal bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 500) upon payment of annual renewal fee

milestones.label: 1,000 bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 250) on annual spends of Rs 20,000 across Landmark Stores
2,000 bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 500) on annual spends of Rs 45,000 across Landmark Stores
5,000 bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 1,250) on annual spends of Rs 95,000 across Landmark Stores
8,000 bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 2,000) on overall annual retail spends of Rs 2 lakh

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 500 and Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per statement cycle
internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card Max product page and terms on 2026-06-13.
